
# cloudru_evolution_organization_quota_resource_type_collection (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudru_evolution_organization_quota_resource_type_collection" "datasource_quota_resource_type" {
}

output "data-quota_resource_type" {
  value = data.cloudru_evolution_organization_quota_resource_type_collection.datasource_quota_resource_type.resource_types[0]
}
```

## Schema

### Read-Only

- `resource_types` (Attributes List) Список типов квотируемых ресурсов. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--resource_types))

<a id="nestedatt--resource_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `resource_types`

Read-Only:

- `code` (String) Код типа.
- `name` (String) Название типа.
- `product_name` (String) Название продукта.
- `unit` (String) Единица измерения.
